sitrep: TRUMP PRIMETIME ADDRESS: First address to nation on Iran war. Said war "nearing completion" — 2-3 more weeks. Vowed to hit power plants "extremely hard" and bring Iran "back to the stone ages" if no deal. Revealed NO clear exit strategy. No solution to Hormuz closure.

OIL SURGED $105.53: Brent +$4.37 (+4.3%) — REVERSED D33 crash. Trump speech = no exit, more escalation. WTI ~$102. Asian markets crashed: Nikkei -2.1%, Kospi -3.9%, Hang Seng -1%. War premium returns.

KHARAZI STRUCK: Former FM Kamal Kharazi (81) gravely wounded, wife killed in Tehran airstrike. Kharazi was overseeing Pakistan back-channel. Iran says diplomacy channel deliberately targeted. Complicates peace prospects.
TEL AVIV WAVE: 14 wounded near Tel Aviv including 11-year-old girl. Iran launched new missile wave after Trump said "destroyed Iranian military." Demonstrates continued capability.
HENGAM ISLAND (HORMUZ): Strike on Hengam Island in Strait of Hormuz — 7 injured. Strategic location controlling strait entrance.
IRAQ ANBAR: Aerial attack on military base in western Anbar — 7 fighters killed, 13 wounded (Iraq MoD).
IRAN DENIES CEASEFIRE: Trump claimed Iran"s new president asked for ceasefire. Iran flatly denied. FM: will fight back as long as strikes continue.
EXTENSIVE STRIKES: Past 24 hours — Tehran, Shiraz, Kermanshah, Sirjan, Ahvaz, Kurdistan. Multi-province bombardment continues unabated.
APRIL 6 = 4 DAYS: Power grid deadline approaching. Trump speech ESCALATED rhetoric. Kharazi strike = targeting mediators. Convergence toward worst case.

US CASUALTIES REVISED UP: Newsweek reports 520+ US personnel wounded (Pentagon had disclosed ~300). Intercept reports Pentagon actively hiding casualty figures. 15 US KIA confirmed. Israeli wounded revised to 6,239+.
HEALTHCARE CRISIS: Iranian Red Crescent reports 316 healthcare/emergency centers damaged since D1. Medical infrastructure degrading across Iran.
INTERNET 768+ HRS: 34 days. Longest in history. 90M isolated.
sitrep_fa: سخنرانی ترامپ: ۲-۳ هفته دیگر. حمله سخت نیروگاه‌ها. بدون استراتژی خروج.
نفت جهش $۱۰۵.۵۳: +۴.۳٪. بازگشت ریسک جنگ. بازارهای آسیا سقوط.
خرازی زخمی: وزیر خارجه سابق زخمی سنگین، همسرش کشته. کانال دیپلماسی پاکستان هدف.
تل‌آویو: ۱۴ زخمی از جمله دختر ۱۱ ساله. موج جدید موشکی.
ایران آتش‌بس رد: ترامپ ادعای تقاضا. ایران تکذیب. ادامه جنگ.
حملات گسترده: تهران، شیراز، کرمانشاه، سیرجان، اهواز، کردستان.
۶ آوریل = ۴ روز. تشدید لفظی + خرازی = بدترین سناریو.
آمار تلفات آمریکا بازنگری: نیوزویک ۵۲۰+ زخمی (پنتاگون ~۳۰۰ اعلام کرده بود). ۱۵ KIA.

dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones reach Saudi western export infrastructure. Pipeline bypass routes no longer safe.

David's Sling malfunction = 2nd interceptor failure in 2 days. 82nd Airborne + 2 MEUs = 6,000-8,000 ground troops = credible Kharg Island threat.

Lebanon: 1,072 killed. IDF authorized 400,000 reservist mobilization. Philippines state of emergency. Japan 30-day reserves. China gas +20%. G7 FM Friday.
dailyRows.assessment: D26 — DUAL-TRACK INFLECTION: 15-point plan = most concrete proposal since D1. Safe passage formal = Hormuz de-escalation signal. 82nd Airborne = ground threat. Iran mocks publicly but engages through intermediaries. David's Sling malfunction. Oil fell on hope.

dailyRows.primary: TANGSIRI KILLED + KHARG FORTIFIED + 7 SALVOS + WH DENIES REJECTION: Israel killed IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas. Iran fortifying Kharg Island (mines/traps/air defenses — CNN). 7 missile salvos at Israel (first Jerusalem-area sirens, 11 injured). CENTCOM: 2/3 arms mfg destroyed. Iran FM rejected plan but WH Leavitt: 'rejection reports FALSE.' Ghalibaf: attacks if islands occupied. Tasnim: Red Sea front threat.
dailyRows.capability: D27: 25+45. TANGSIRI = most significant naval decapitation. CENTCOM: 2/3 arms mfg destroyed = massive industrial damage. BUT Iran STILL launching 7 salvos/day + fortifying Kharg with mines/traps = preparing for ground war phase. Iran's counter-escalation posture: if you come to our islands, we attack your Gulf allies' infrastructure + open Red Sea front. Safe passage expanding despite Tangsiri death = institutional.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106.12 (+3.8%). Gas $3.981 (first drop). Iran 1,937 killed (AJ). Gulf 25+. UAE 11 dead, 357 ballistic + 1,815 drones cumul. Pew 59% wrong. Ghalibaf + Tasnim threats = Iran deterring Gulf cooperation. GCC 6-country condemnation. WH/Iran contradictory messaging on rejection.
dailyRows.assessment: D27 — FOUR COLLIDING DYNAMICS: (1) TANGSIRI KILLED + Kharg fortified = Iran losing commanders but preparing ground defense. (2) CENTCOM 2/3 destroyed + IDF fait accompli = industrial base being eliminated. (3) WH denies rejection while Iran says 'no negotiations' = contradictory messaging for domestic audiences. (4) Kharg mines/traps + Ghalibaf threat + Tasnim Red Sea = Iran preparing deterrence against ground ops.

Iran hit PSAB: 6 ballistic + 29 drones, 10-15 US troops wounded (2-5 serious), refueling aircraft destroyed + E-3 AWACS damaged. Iran released satellite photos. Trump confirmed April 6 deadline. Contradiction: 'ahead of schedule' vs 'thousands of targets left' vs Houthi entry = no coherent endgame strategy visible.

theoryEvaluation.title: TRUMP SPEECH — escalation disguised as reassurance
theoryEvaluation.body: Trump told nation war is "nearing completion" but revealed NO exit strategy, threatened to hit power plants "extremely hard," and projected 2-3 more weeks minimum. Markets read correctly: oil surged, Asian stocks crashed. Speech INCREASED probability of April 6 power grid strikes.

theoryEvaluation.title: KHARAZI STRIKE — diplomacy channel targeted
theoryEvaluation.body: Ex-FM Kharazi was overseeing Pakistan back-channel — the most active mediation track. His wounding (wife killed) may be deliberate targeting of peace infrastructure. Iran will frame this as proof US/Israel prefer war to negotiation. Complicates China-Pakistan plan.

theoryEvaluation.title: OIL REVERSAL — market corrects D33 mispricing
theoryEvaluation.body: Brent surged $105.53 (+4.3%) after D33 crash to $102. Exactly as predicted: Passover barrage + Trump speech = war premium returns. Market now pricing in longer war, power grid risk, no Hormuz resolution.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRAN SUSTAINED POST-PASSOVER — 55/day proves reserves
theoryEvaluation.body: D34 at 55 missiles (down from 65 D33 but well above 25-30 pre-Passover average). Iran demonstrated surge capability D33 and maintained elevated tempo D34. Rationing model confirmed. "6 months" increasingly credible.

theoryEvaluation.title: APRIL 6 — 4 days + trajectory worsening
theoryEvaluation.body: Trump speech escalated rhetoric. Kharazi strike targeted mediator. Oil surging. Iran defiant. Each day narrows diplomatic space. April 6 power grid strikes now MOST LIKELY scenario.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ایران مستمر — ۵۵/روز = ذخیره

GCC: Hengam (UAE/Oman strait area). New tanker off Qatar. Insurance crisis. Banking crisis. Demanding ceasefire.
IAEA: Locked out. 440kg. 5 facilities. Kharazi not nuclear but diplomatic vacuum worsens oversight.
keyActors_fa: آمریکا: سخنرانی = ۲-۳ هفته + نیروگاه. بدون خروج. ۱۵ KIA + ۵۲۰+ زخمی (پنتاگون پنهان‌کاری). نفت جهش.
اسرائیل: خرازی هدف. تل‌آویو ۱۴ زخمی. بمباران مستمر.
ایران: ۵۵ موشک = مستمر. رد آتش‌بس. چندجبهه. کانال آسیب.
پاکستان: خرازی (تماس آنها) زخمی. میانجیگری در خطر.

exponentialDecay.label: Depletion Model
exponentialDecay.description: Assumes stockpiles structurally depleted — exponential decay continues to zero
exponentialDecay.description_fa: فرض بر اتمام ساختاری ذخایر — کاهش نمایی تا صفر ادامه دارد
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome: Iran ceases offensive operations by mid-April. War ends via military exhaustion + negotiated exit. Coalition declares victory.
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران عملیات تهاجمی را تا اواسط آوریل متوقف می‌کند. جنگ با فرسایش نظامی + خروج مذاکره‌ای پایان می‌یابد.
exponentialDecay.falsifiedBy: D34 at 55/day = sustained well above exponential decay prediction. Model essentially dead since D18. Passover surge + D34 sustained = definitive falsification.

plateauRationing.label: Rationing Model
plateauRationing.description: Assumes plateau at ~30/day = strategic rationing from deeper stockpiles (IRGC D16 claim)
plateauRationing.description_fa: فرض بر جیره‌بندی استراتژیک از ذخایر عمیق‌تر (ادعای سپاه D16)
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome: Iran maintains harassment for 2+ months. War ends via negotiation under mutual exhaustion, or escalation spiral if ceiling breached.
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران آزار را ۲+ ماه حفظ می‌کند. جنگ با مذاکره یا مارپیچ تشدید پایان می‌یابد.
plateauRationing.falsifiedBy: Launches <15/day for 5 consecutive days. D33 surged to 65, D34 sustained at 55. Plateau BROKEN UPWARD — Iran can surge above plateau when strategically motivated. Revised plateau ~36/day (7-day avg with surge).

vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion: D34: 55 missiles = sustained above pre-Passover average. Iran maintained elevated tempo day after surge. CENTCOM claims 90% degraded but 55/day contradicts. Score HOLDS 7.5 — rationing model dominant.
vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion_fa: D34: ۵۵ موشک = بالای میانگین. ایران مستمر. ۷.۵ ثابت.
vectorNotes.economicPain: Brent SURGED $105.53 (+4.3%) reversing D33 crash. Trump speech = no exit + power grid threats. Asian markets crashed. WTI ~$102. War premium returns. Score UP 8->9.
vectorNotes.economicPain_fa: برنت جهش $۱۰۵. سخنرانی ترامپ. بازارهای آسیا سقوط. ۹.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum: WORSENED: Kharazi (Pakistan back-channel lead) gravely wounded, wife killed. Iran denies ceasefire. Trump rhetoric escalatory. Diplomatic channel physically targeted. Score DOWN 6->5.5.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum_fa: بدتر: خرازی زخمی، همسرش کشته. ایران رد. ترامپ تشدیدی. ۵.۵.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability: Trump speech revealed no exit. Pew 59% wrong. 15 US KIA + 520+ wounded (Newsweek revised UP — Pentagon accused of hiding figures per Intercept). Gas >$4. Markets crashed. "2-3 more weeks" = indefinite. Casualty transparency scandal = further political erosion. Score HOLDS 1.5.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability_fa: سخنرانی بدون خروج. پیو ۵۹٪. ۱۵ KIA + ۵۲۰+ زخمی (پنتاگون پنهان‌کاری). بنزین >$۴. ۱.۵.
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance: CRITICAL: April 6 = 4 days. Trump explicitly threatened power grid. Kharazi strike = targeting mediators. Oil surging = pressure building. Score DOWN 1->0.5. NEAREST to ceiling since war began.
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance_fa: بحرانی: ۶ آوریل = ۴ روز. ترامپ تهدید نیروگاه. خرازی = هدف میانجی. ۰.۵.

warOutcome.prediction: REVISED: April 6 power grid strikes now MOST LIKELY outcome (30% escalation). Trump speech provided no off-ramp. Kharazi strike damaged Pakistan back-channel. Oil surging = economic pressure intensifying. Iran sustained at 55/day post-Passover. Most probable: power grid strikes Apr 6 -> humanitarian catastrophe -> forced international intervention within 2-3 weeks.
warOutcome.prediction_fa: بازنگری: حمله نیروگاه ۶ آوریل محتمل‌ترین (۳۰٪). سخنرانی بدون خروج. خرازی = کانال آسیب. نفت جهش. بحران بشردوستانه -> مداخله بین‌المللی ۲-۳ هفته.
warOutcome.derivation: MilExh 7.5 (HOLDS — 55/day sustained) + EconPain 9 (UP — oil surged, markets crashed) + DiplMom 5.5 (DOWN — Kharazi struck) + USPol 1.5 (HOLDS — no exit) + EscCeil 0.5 (DOWN — 4 days to April 6, Trump explicit threat). Trajectory: ALL vectors converging toward escalation.
warOutcome.derivation_fa: فرسایش ۷.۵ + اقتصادی ۹ (افزایش) + دیپلماسی ۵.۵ (کاهش) + سیاسی ۱.۵ + سقف ۰.۵ (کاهش). همه بردارها به تشدید.
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation: 6.4/10 = HIGH and RISING (from 6.2). Economic pain surged. Escalation ceiling nearest ever at 0.5. Diplomatic momentum declining as channels targeted. Resolution pressure building but channeling toward escalation NOT peace. April 6 = inflection.
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation_fa: ۶.۴/۱۰ = بالا و افزایش از ۶.۲. درد اقتصادی جهش. سقف نزدیک‌ترین تاریخ ۰.۵. فشار تشدید نه صلح.

82,000+ structures damaged. Warehouse status unknown. Need physical inspection + digital inventory reconciliation.
700km overland through Tabriz-Agarak. Border congestion likely. Customs uncertain. 3x normal cost. 14-21 day transit.
Full chain: Tehran warehouse → overland → Armenia/Turkey → air freight → Atlanta → UPS. Every link currently broken.
Requires: Hormuz open, Dubai air cargo resumed, banking normalized, publishing industry recovered. Each is months away.

هرمز + دبی + بانک + نشر. هرکدام ماه‌ها.

routeViability.detail: Only route not dependent on airspace or Hormuz. Requires functioning Tehran logistics + internet for coordination. Currently theoretical — no shipments attempted since D1.

routeViability.detail: Erdogan positioning as mediator but border sealed for commercial cargo from Iran. Could reopen post-ceasefire.

routeViability.detail: Qatar LNG facilities struck. Oman port targeted D29. No viable air cargo path through either.

routeViability_fa.detail: تنها مسیر بدون وابستگی به حریم هوایی یا هرمز.
مسیر اصلی قبل جنگ. آخرین مسیر بازگشت.
تأسیسات LNG قطر + بندر عمان هدف.

ofacStatus.risk: LOW for exemption itself. MEDIUM for payment channel — KEMCO SARL (France) may face enhanced banking scrutiny on Iran-linked transfers during wartime.
ofacStatus.risk_fa: پایین برای معافیت. متوسط برای کانال پرداخت — KEMCO (فرانسه) ممکن بررسی بانکی تشدید شود.

tehranCommsStatus.detail: 768+ hours (34 days). Multi-province bombing continues (Tehran, Shiraz, Kermanshah, Ahvaz, Kurdistan). Kharazi struck. Cannot verify warehouse/staff/inventory.
tehranCommsStatus.detail_fa: ۷۶۸+ ساعت. بمباران چنداستانی. خرازی زخمی. تأیید ناممکن.

inventoryRunway.detail: ~3 months remaining. Trump 2-3 weeks + Kharazi strike = ceasefire mid-April very unlikely. Runs out July-August. FY27 at serious risk.
inventoryRunway.detail_fa: ~۳ ماه. ترامپ ۲-۳ هفته + خرازی = آتش‌بس کم‌احتمال. FY27 ریسک جدی.
inventoryRunway.criticalDate: Late July 2026. Kharazi strike + Trump speech = ceasefire further delayed. Critical date approaching.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.
publishingDeepDive_fa: کاغذ و مرکب: ایران ۷۰٪+ کاغذ چاپ وارد می‌کند. هرمز + تحریم = زنجیره قطع. کارخانه‌ها ۲۰-۳۰٪ ظرفیت.
ظرفیت چاپ: چاپخانه‌های تهران متناوب. قطع اینترنت ۷۶۸+ ساعت = پیش‌چاپ دیجیتال ناممکن. ۸۰-۹۰٪ کاهش.
توزیع: شبکه (شهر کتاب و غیره) مختل. ۸۲,۰۰۰+ ساختمان آسیب. فروشگاه‌ها بسته. سفارش آنلاین ناممکن.
سانسور: ارشاد احتمالاً فعال اما ظرفیت نامشخص. مجوز کتاب ممکن تعلیق.
بقای ناشران: ناشران کوچک/متوسط بحران وجودی. انتشارات دانشگاهی بهتر. انتظار ادغام/تعطیلی پس از جنگ.
جایگزین دیجیتال: طاقچه، فیدیبو غیرفعال. پس بازگشت اینترنت سریع‌تر. اما دانشگاه‌ها نسخه فیزیکی نیاز دارند.

dubaiBankingRisk.detail: D34: Hengam Island struck + tanker off Qatar + Aqua 1 D33 + Dubai D32. 3 maritime incidents in 3 days. Oil surging. Trump no exit. Score HOLDS 9.5.
dubaiBankingRisk.detail_fa: هنگام + نفتکش قطر + Aqua 1 + دبی = ۳ حادثه ۳ روز. نفت جهش. ۹.۵.
dubaiBankingRisk.action: CRITICAL: Withdraw ALL Gulf funds (UAE + Qatar). Move to Tbilisi/KL immediately.

alternativeHubs.notes: Strong logistics infrastructure. Turkish banks cautious on Iran-linked trade but not frozen. Erdogan mediator role creates political cover. Risk: Turkey's NATO membership creates compliance friction. Currency volatility (TRY).
Oman traditionally neutral. Banking corridor to Iran still partially open. BUT port targeted by 2 UAVs D29 — risk profile changing. Proximity to conflict zone.
Safe from conflict. Growing Iranian diaspora + business presence. Limited logistics infrastructure. Small banking sector. Good for cash preservation, poor for trade operations.

Furthest from conflict. CIMB + Maybank process Iran-adjacent trade. Free zones available. Challenge: time zone, distance from customers, unfamiliar regulatory environment. BEST for risk-averse repositioning.

alternativeHubs_fa.notes: لجستیک قوی. بانک‌ها محتاط. اردوغان میانجی. ریسک: ناتو + نوسان لیر.
عمان خنثی. بانک باز. اما بندر هدف D29. نزدیک منطقه درگیری.
امن. لجستیک محدود. بانک کوچک. برای حفظ نقدینگی.
دورترین. CIMB + Maybank. منطقه آزاد. بهترین برای ریسک‌گریزی.

hormuzReopeningTimeline.detail: Currently ~5-10 vessels/day via Iran's yuan-based toll. Pakistan Aframax transited. Needs: formal multilateral framework + navy escort.
Maham 3/7 mines confirmed. Clearance requires specialized MCM vessels. US + UK + France MCM assets in region but not deployed to clear yet.
Lloyd's JWC listed entire Persian Gulf. War risk premium 3.8% of hull value (from 0.02% pre-war). Won't normalize until mines cleared + 90 days incident-free.
Requires: mines cleared, insurance normalized, port infrastructure repaired, Bab al-Mandab safe (Houthi factor). 1,000+ stranded tankers to process.

hormuzReopeningTimeline_fa.detail: فعلاً ~۵-۱۰ با عوارض یوآنی. نیاز: چارچوب چندجانبه + اسکورت.
مهام ۳/۷ تأیید. نیاز به ناوهای MCM تخصصی.
لویدز کل خلیج. حق‌بیمه ۳.۸٪ (از ۰.۰۲٪). نیاز: مین‌روبی + ۹۰ روز بدون حادثه.
مین + بیمه + بندر + باب‌المندب. ۱,۰۰۰+ نفتکش معطل.

strandedCargo.location: Jebel Ali Free Zone + Hamriyah Free Zone
strandedCargo.detail: Most cargo insured under pre-war marine policies. Claims processing delayed — Lloyd's overwhelmed. Perishables (~15% by value) written off. Non-perishable goods safe in bonded storage but incurring daily storage fees (~$150/container/day).
strandedCargo.detail_fa: اکثر بار بیمه. پردازش خسارت تأخیر. فاسدشدنی (~۱۵٪) از دست رفته. غیرفاسدشدنی در انبار اما هزینه روزانه (~$۱۵۰/کانتینر/روز).

insuranceCostIndex.note: D34: Hengam Island (Hormuz entrance) struck + tanker off Qatar D34 + Aqua 1 D33 + Dubai D32 = 3 maritime incidents in 3 days. Hull 12.5% = effectively uninsurable. Gulf-wide port anchorage unsafe.

cumulativeByCountry._note: Estimated cumul ~3,185 missiles / ~5,062 drones through D34. D34: Trump primetime + Kharazi struck + oil surged. Hengam Island + tanker off Qatar + Tel Aviv 14 wounded.
